title: improved item
description: Improved some Minecraft item and mob.
body: # Improved Item Mod Transform your Minecraft combat with throwable axes and magical enchantments! ## 🔥 What's New ### planning update - plan to add more version to fit other Minecraft versions ## features [wiki](https://github.com/zhengzhengyiyi/improved_item/wiki) You can check the wiki, I am still making it. ## dependencies mod requested cloth-config ## configure menu default to press "o" to open it. ![show case of the configure menu](https://i.ibb.co/qF4mdxYY/Screen-Shot-2025-07-31-at-9-36-17-PM.png) ## planning updates - improve more item (entity) - add new version that work with other Minecraft versions ## 🛠️ Installation ### You'll Need: - Fabric Mod Loader ([Download here](https://fabricmc.net/use/)) - Fabric API ([Get it here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)) - modmenu ([Get it here](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)) ### Simple Steps: 1. Download the mod `.jar` file 2. Put it in your `mods` folder 3. Start the game! ### issue tracker - If you find any issue or bug, please report them on [issue tracker](https://github.com/zhengzhengyiyi/improved_item/issues)
